parse.title: Profane Hydra
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency = 
|similaritems = Ravenous Hydra;Stridebreaker;Titanic Hydra;Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Bastionbreaker
|background = 
|notes = 
* {{sbc|Cleave}} deals {{tip|proc damage}} and is tagged as {{tip|area damage|area of effect}} without applying {{tip|spell effects}}.
* {{sbc|Cleave}} is not blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* {{sbc|Cleave}} does not trigger on attacks against structures.
* {{sbc|Cleave}} will '''not''' trigger if the basic attack does not deal damage, such as if the target was {{tip|invulnerable}}.{{bug}}
** This is unlike {{ii|Tiamat}}, {{ii|Ravenous Hydra}}, {{ii|Stridebreaker}}, and {{ii|Titanic Hydra}}, which will trigger {{sbc|Cleave}} even if the basic attack had dealt no damage.
* {{sbc|Cleave}} can only damage a unit once per {{tip|cast instance}}.{{bug}}
** This is unlike {{ii|Tiamat}}, {{ii|Ravenous Hydra}}, {{ii|Stridebreaker}}, and {{ii|Titanic Hydra}}, which can damage a single target multiple times if {{sbc|Cleave}} is triggered multiple times per cast instance (eg. using {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}).
* A single attack can cause a maximum of 10 {{sbc|Cleave}} splashes.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave}} deals {{tip|area damage}} and thus will trigger spell effects.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave}} is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave}} is an [[auto-targeted]] effect.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave's}} center is offset by 100 units in the direction the caster is facing.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave's}} cast breaks {{tip|stealth}}.
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave}} has a [[cast time]] equal to the user's [[Basic attack#Windup|attack windup]].
** If '''Profane Hydra's''' item slot is changed during this cast time, the area of effect spell will not occur.{{bug}}
* {{sbc|Heretical Cleave}} goes on cooldown upon being used, at the start of its cast.
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* Along with {{ii|Ravenous Hydra}} and {{ii|Titanic Hydra}}, Profane Hydra borrows its namesake from the {{w|Lernaean Hydra|Hydra}}, a many-headed beast.
** They also build from {{ii|Tiamat}}, which shares its name with the [http://www.dandwiki.com/wiki/Tiamat_(3.5e_Deity) five headed dragon goddess] in the {{w|Dungeons & Dragons}} {{w|Tabletop role-playing game|tabletop RPG}}.
[[File:Bilgewater Crest icon.png|link=Bilgewater|100px|center]]
|quotes =

|revisions = 
|patchhistory =
;[[V25.17]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2850}} from {{g|3200}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|313}} from {{g|663}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 55 from 60.

;[[V25.14]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} A single attack can now cause a maximum of 10 ''Cleave'' splashes, instead of an unlimited number of them.

;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|3200}} from {{g|3300}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|663}} from {{g|763}}.
* Ability haste reduced to 10 from 20.
* Cleave radius reduced to 350 units from 450.
* Cleave AD ratio reduced to {{as|{{rd|40%|20%}} AD}} from {{as|{{rd|50%|25%}} AD}}.
* Heretical Cleave AD ratio reduced to {{as|80% AD}} from {{as|100% AD}}.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} Heretical Cleave's damage is no longer increased to {{as|130% AD}} against those below {{as|50% '''maximum''' health}}.

;[[V14.9#May 6th Hotfix|V14.9]] - May 6th Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Item grants innate lethality once again.

;[[V14.5]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Active damage no longer benefits from life steal.

;[[V14.4]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Heretical Cleave range indicator is now properly offset from the center by 100 units, matching the hitbox.
 
;[[V14.3]]
* Cleave damage increased to {{as|{{rd|50%|25%}} AD}} from {{as|{{rd|40%|20%}} AD}}.
* Heretical Cleave damage on low-health target reduced to {{as|130% AD}} from {{as|150% AD}}.

;[[V14.1#January 12th Hotfix|V14.1]] - January 12th Hotfix
* Total cost reduced to {{g|3300}} from {{g|3400}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|763}} from {{g|863}}.
* Heretical Cleave AD ratio increased to {{as|100% AD}} from {{as|80% AD}}.
** Heretical Cleave enhanced AD ratio increased to {{as|150% AD}} from {{as|120% AD}}.
* Heretical Cleave health threshold increased to {{as|50% '''maximum''' health}} from {{as|30%|health}}.

;[[V14.1]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Tiamat}} + {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{g|863}} = {{g|3400}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 20 ability haste, 18 lethality.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Cleave:}} Damaging basic attacks deal {{rd|{{as|40% AD}}|{{as|20% AD}}}} {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 450 units of the target.
* {{sbc|Unique Active - Heretical Cleave:}} Deal {{as|80% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 450 radius, increased to {{as|{{fd|120}}% AD}} against those below {{as|30% '''maximum''' health}} (10 second cooldown).
* Limited to 1 {{sbc|Cleave}} item.
* {{sbc|Caption:}} "The depths demand sacrifice."
}}

[[Category:Season 2024 item release]]
